title: cycles of rain
description: dont install, forgor to do bugtests good and it dont work.
body:
## this mod

this mod makes the rain come in customisable cycles with a customisable amount of fource (damage)


"inspired" by rainworld

# why you should use this
1. why not
2. rainworld (yes the comunity will use this mod because rainworld)
3. chalenge
4. you can make the rain not deadly and use it for the predictable weather I guess


# misc info
config implimented using gamerules
